title: canthium cymosum
intro: Canthium cymosum, also known as 'Ivory stone tree', is a plant species belonging to the Loganiaceae family. The medicinal properties of Canthium cymosum include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits associated with this plant include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Canthium cymosum is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for its medicinal properties, and it can also be used to make a paste for topical application.
